record.field: Mage is an open-source data pipeline framework that blends the flexibility of notebooks with the rigor of modular, production-ready code.

Mage is an open-source data pipeline framework that blends the flexibility of notebooks with the rigor of modular, production-ready code.

It lets data engineers and analysts build, run, and orchestrate ETL/ELT pipelines using Python, SQL, or R within a single workflow, backed by an interactive UI that previews output as you write each step. Pre-built connectors move data between databases, APIs, cloud storage, and warehouses, while a built-in scheduler, monitoring, and alerting keep pipelines running in production. Positioned as a developer-friendly alternative to Airflow, it favors modular, testable, reusable pipeline blocks over opaque DAG definitions.

Key features
  • Modular pipeline blocks written in Python, SQL, or R, mixable in one pipeline
  • Interactive notebook-style editor with real-time output preview and step-by-step debugging
  • Pre-built connectors for databases, APIs, cloud object storage, and data warehouses (ETL/ELT)
  • Built-in scheduling (cron-based), orchestration, monitoring, logs, and alerting
  • dbt integration and support for data versioning, cataloging, and partitioning
  • Self-hosted deployment with Terraform templates for AWS, GCP, and Azure
Best for

Data engineering and analytics teams that need a self-hosted, code-first tool to build and orchestrate data integration and transformation pipelines, and teams looking for a more interactive, modular alternative to traditional DAG-based orchestrators like Airflow.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_automation'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_workflow'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_dev_tools'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_analytics'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_database'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_no_code'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_ai')])]

record.field: services: mage-ai: image: mageai/mageai:0.9.78 command: mage start {{ project_name }} environment: USER_CODE_PATH: /home/src/{{ project_name }} ENV: {{ env }} expose: - 6789 volumes: - ./mageai_data:/home/src/ restart: unless-stopped healthcheck: test: - CMD - curl - -s - -f - -o - /dev/null - http://localhost:6789 interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 5 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:6789' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
